agent_instruction: Use this tool to schedule a task or add a to-do item to the user's agenda.

function.name: append_agenda
function.description: Append a new task to the user's Org mode agenda file.

task_name.description: The name or title of the task.

scheduled_date.description: The date to schedule the task, formatted EXACTLY as YYYY-MM-DD Day (e.g., 2026-04-17 Fri).

description.description: A short, one-sentence description of the task.
